title: Iran war has cost US $37.5bn so far, Hegseth says, as Pentagon seeks billions more
summary_full: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.
summary_public: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.
